title: The Escape Plan Tightens
description: On pages 12–14, this part follows Unknown person #1, Doflamingo, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the escape plan tightens.
scene: The scene focuses on the escape plan tightens, with Unknown person #1, Doflamingo, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: SHIT!! WE WERE REALLY BETRAYED BY LAW!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The boss himself makes an appearance

summary: The Escape Plan Tightens. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
